segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Hi Shannon – how are you settling into your new flat?
segments.zh: 嗨，香农——新公寓住得还习惯吗？

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Really well, thanks.
segments.zh: 挺好的，谢谢。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: You look like you're going shopping.
segments.zh: 你看起来像是要去购物。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Yes, I am.
segments.zh: 是的。我表兄妹要来住几天，我得给他们做饭。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: My cousins are coming to stay for a couple of days, and I have to cook for them.

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Well, there are plenty of places to buy food in Kite Place – it's the area by the harbour.
segments.zh: 嗯，凯特广场有很多买食物的地方——就是港口附近那片区域。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Oh, OK, I'll find that on the map.
segments.zh: 哦，好的，我在地图上找找。谢谢。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Thanks.

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: What sort of food do you need to get?
segments.zh: 你需要买什么食物？

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Well, neither of them eats meat but they both like fish.
segments.zh: 嗯，他们俩都不吃肉，但都喜欢吃鱼。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Well, there's a really good fish market there.
segments.zh: 嗯，那里有一个非常好的鱼市。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Oh great – where is it exactly?
segments.zh: 哦，太好了——具体在哪儿？

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: It's at the far end of Kite Place, so you have to go over the bridge and then it's on the right.
segments.zh: 在风筝广场的尽头，你得先过桥，然后就在右边。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: OK – is it open all day?
segments.zh: 好的——它全天营业吗？

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: It doesn't close until four, but I'd recommend going earlier than that – it does run out of some things.
segments.zh: 四点才关门，但我建议你早点去——有些东西会卖完。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Oh, I don't want that to happen.
segments.zh: 哦，我可不想那样。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: As long as you get there by 3.30, you should be fine.
segments.zh: 只要你在三点半之前到那儿，就没问题。现在才十一点，时间很充裕。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: It's only 11 now, so plenty of time.

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Do you need to buy vegetables too?
segments.zh: 你还需要买蔬菜吗？

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: I do, and I want to avoid all the plastic packaging in the supermarket!
segments.zh: 是的，而且我想避开超市里所有的塑料包装！

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Well, there's a really nice organic shop there.
segments.zh: 嗯，那里有一家很不错的有机商店。叫什么来着……是一种花的名字。我想起来了，叫‘玫瑰’。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Now what's it called ... it's the name of a flower.

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: I know, it's 'Rose'.

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: That's a nice name.
segments.zh: 这名字真好听。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Yeah – it sells vegetables and quite a lot of other stuff.
segments.zh: 是啊——它卖蔬菜，还有很多其他东西。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: And where's that?
segments.zh: 那它在哪儿？

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Well, as you reach the market, you'll see a big grey building on your left – I think it used to be a warehouse.
segments.zh: 嗯，当你走到市场时，你会看到左边有一栋灰色的大楼——我觉得它以前是个仓库。总之，现在楼上是一家餐厅，但底层入口两侧各有一家店，它就在左边那家。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Anyway, now it's a restaurant upstairs, but the ground floor has two shops either side of the entrance and it's the one on the left.

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: That's easy enough.
segments.zh: 那挺容易找的。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: You can't miss it – there's also a big sign on the pavement so you can look for that.
segments.zh: 你不会错过的——人行道上还有个很大的标志牌，你可以找找看。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Fine!
segments.zh: 好吧！我想如果还需要别的，我就得去超市了。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: I guess if I need anything else, I'll have to go to the supermarket.

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Yeah – you should be able to get everything you need, but there's a minibus that goes to the supermarket if you need it.
segments.zh: 是的——你应该能买到所有需要的东西，但如果你需要的话，有辆小巴可以去超市。它是紫色的，车号是289。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: It's purple and the number is 289.

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Thanks, that's great.
segments.zh: 谢谢，太好了。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: So what do you need to get at the fish market?
segments.zh: 那你要去鱼市买什么？三文鱼和贝类一直都很不错。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: The salmon is always very good and the shellfish.

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: I'm going to make a curry, I think, and I need about 12 prawns for that.
segments.zh: 我想做个咖喱，需要大约12只大虾。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: They'll have plenty of those.
segments.zh: 他们会有很多。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Have you ever tried samphire?
segments.zh: 你吃过海蓬子吗？

words.def: 海蓬子（一种可食用海草）

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: No – what's that?
segments.zh: 没有——那是什么？

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: It's a type of seaweed.
segments.zh: 是一种海草。我就要一把，然后用黄油煎一下。味道好极了！

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: I just ask for a handful and you fry it in butter.

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: It's delicious!

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Oh, I might try that – how do you spell it?
segments.zh: 哦，我可能会试试——怎么拼写？

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: It's S-A-M-P-H-I-R-E.
segments.zh: 是S-A-M-P-H-I-R-E。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Great – it's always good to try something different.
segments.zh: 太好了——尝试新东西总是好的。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Yeah.
segments.zh: 是啊。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: I'll see what beans they have in the organic shop and I think I'll get something for dessert there.
segments.zh: 我去看看有机店里有什么豆子，我想再买点甜点。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: How about a mango?
segments.zh: 来点芒果怎么样？

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: I'm not sure – they're not always ripe.
segments.zh: 我不太确定——芒果不一定都熟了。我更喜欢甜瓜，也更大个。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: I'd prefer a melon – it's bigger too.

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: Good idea.
segments.zh: 好主意。老板那儿还卖很多香料，可以放咖喱里，还有椰子之类的东西。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: The owner also sells a lot of spices there that you can put in a curry, and things like coconut.

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Oh, that's very helpful.
segments.zh: 哦，那太有帮助了。我看看。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: I'll have a look.

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: No problem.
segments.zh: 没问题。

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: I know bread doesn't really go with curry but I always like to have some in case.
segments.zh: 我知道面包和咖喱不太搭，但我总喜欢备着一些，以防万一。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: As I said – all the bread is home-made and there's lots of variety.
segments.zh: 我说过，所有面包都是自制的，种类很多。我个人喜欢黑面包。

segments.speaker: LEON
segments.en: I like the brown bread myself.

segments.speaker: SHANNON
segments.en: Mm, sounds good.
segments.zh: 嗯，听起来不错。

pairs.note: near 和 by 都表示'在……附近'，是同义替换。
原文直接重复了 Kite Place，帮助定位。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句直接提到 Kite Place 和 by the harbour，其中 by 替换了题干中的 near，因此答案就是 harbour。

pairs.note: cross 和 go over 都表示'穿过'，这里指过桥。
turn right 是动作，on the right 是位置，但都指向右边。

paraphrase.explain: 题干说'过桥然后右转'，原文说'go over the bridge and then it's on the right'，所以 bridge 是答案。

items.prompt: best to go before 3 ________ pm, earlier than closing time

pairs.note: 题干说before 3 pm，原文说by 3.30，时间点不同，但都是截止时间，需要听具体数字。
题干说比关门时间早，原文说在3.30之前到就行，暗示关门时间可能更晚，但定位到3.30。

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求‘在下午3点之前，比关门时间早’，原文说‘只要在3.30之前到就行’，所以答案就是3.30。

pairs.note: 题干中的called在原文中直接出现，完全一致。
题干中需要填的空对应原文中的'Rose'，直接匹配。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干中的called和引号定位到原文中同样出现called和'Rose'的位置，直接得出答案。

pairs.note: large 和 big 是同义词，都表示‘大的’
outside 在原文中被具体化为‘在人行道上’，表示室外位置
原文直接重复了 look for，帮助定位

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的 large 对应原文的 big，outside 对应 on the pavement，而 look for 直接重复，因此答案 sign 出现在原文中。

pairs.note: 题干和原文都出现了minibus，直接对应。
题干和原文都提到了289这个数字，直接对应。
题干中缺少的颜色词在原文中由'purple'提供，这是对minibus的描述。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'There's a minibus... It's purple and the number is 289'，其中'purple'就是题干中需要填写的颜色词，而'minibus'和'289'帮助确认了目标。

pairs.note: 题干说'a handful of'（一把），原文说'Have you ever tried'（你尝过吗），意思相近，都是引出某种海藻。
原文直接给出海藻名称'samphire'，与题干'type of seaweed'对应。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问'a handful of'后面接什么海藻，原文说'Have you ever tried samphire?'，所以答案就是'samphire'。

pairs.note: 题干说 'beans and a ... for dessert'，原文说 'I'd prefer a melon'，melon 是甜点选项，对应填空处。

paraphrase.explain: 听到 'I'd prefer a melon' 时，注意 melon 是甜点，与题干 'for dessert' 对应，直接填入 melon。
